name: CyberArk
description: CyberArk Privileged Access Management (Self-Hosted PVWA / Privilege Cloud) identity sync via the REST API. Collects privileged accounts (→ non-human/privileged identities, with their target address, platform, safe and secret type) and vault users (→ human or component identities) into XORCISM (IDENTITY), so privileged credentials feed the Identity & IAM inventory for orphaned-NHI, stale-secret (rotation) and privilege detection. Authenticates with a service account — secrets from the worker environment: CYBERARK_BASE_URL, CYBERARK_USERNAME, CYBERARK_PASSWORD (and optional CYBERARK_AUTH_METHOD = CyberArk | LDAP | RADIUS | Windows). REST API: https://docs.cyberark.com/pam-self-hosted/latest/en/content/webservices/implementing%20privileged%20account%20security%20web%20services%20.htm.

parameters.name: base_url
parameters.help: PVWA / Privilege Cloud base URL (e.g. https://pvwa.example.com). Overrides CYBERARK_BASE_URL.

parameters.name: auth_method
parameters.help: Logon method: CyberArk (default), LDAP, RADIUS or Windows. Overrides CYBERARK_AUTH_METHOD.

parameters.name: include
parameters.help: Comma-separated object types to sync: accounts, users (default: both).

parameters.name: max_items
parameters.help: Maximum objects to pull per type (default 1000).

parameters.name: file
parameters.help: Offline mode: a saved CyberArk REST JSON export to parse instead of calling the API. Accepts {accounts:[],users:[]} or a raw {value:[...]} / {Users:[...]} array.
